gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reported a v1 sidecar compatibility break and a strict-release bypass for legacy supported sidecars; fixed by accepting legacy v1 records while requiring matching delegate contract proof for strict release support.
what_changed: Hardened built-in native probe factory diagnostics so supported delegates must declare the Document KV adapter contract.
Recorded delegate contract status in native probe factory sidecars while preserving legacy v1 sidecar validation.
Made strict release bundles count native factory support only when delegate contract proof is present and valid.
Updated document, legacy, and cachet public exports plus README guidance for downstream vLLM/SGLang delegate declarations.
why: Prevent vLLM/SGLang native adapter integrations from appearing supported when they only import but do not attest to the handoff/probe/action contract.
